description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish releases that triggers on pull request opened, reopened, and synchronize events, and on push to main, master, and tags. The workflow has two jobs: create-release and pyinstaller-executable. The create-release job checks out the code, determines a tag based on the Git reference, deletes previous releases and tags, tags the release, and creates a new release. The pyinstaller-executable job depends on create-release, checks out the code, caches pip, mypy, and npm, sets up Python 3.9, builds the development environment and executable, zips the executable, and publishes it to the release, while also notifying collaborators with a pull request comment.
